spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates the spec's headline surface — page mentions 2 of 2 extracted API names from the spec.

interactive.rationale: Real controls + script-driven side-effects make this hands-on, not a static card.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Page covers the promises the feature index makes for this concept.

edge_cases.rationale: Adds an invalid-value fallback probe for video and audio and DevTools verified the eager fallback. The eager reset path also now reloads all items instead of leaving them deferred.

references.rationale: Cites the chromestatus.com/feature/5200068565139456 reference link and the HTML media loading attribute section.

design_system.rationale: Uses CSS variables throughout, no raw hex, button overrides keep bg+color paired.

summary: Chrome DevTools verification exercised lazy scrolling, eager reset, and invalid-value fallback; the page now has the required references and no remaining critique questions.
